title: Easy Elytra Launchers [EEL]
description: Are you bored of fireworks with elytras? Try this datapack! This datapack adds a craftable elytra launcher.
body:
## Description

This datapack adds a craftable elytra launcher that, well launches you high to the sky.
## Some Info

- You can get help from my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gXbxjnpg6M).
- The mod has sometimes problems, so the datapack is recommended.
- The project works now!
